testsuite.name: contactModule.ContactModuleTest

testcase.name: CreateContactWithSupportDatesTest
testcase.system-out: Completed Create Contact with support dates

testsuite.system-out: Suite Execution Started-Adv report configuration Connected with DB Configured the parallel Exe Launching the browser Completed Crate Org with industry and it's type Completed Crate Org with phone number Completed Create Org Launching the browser Completed Create Contact with org Completed Create Contact with support dates Completed with Create Contact
